title: Sundiata: An Epic of Old Mali
description: The foundation epic of the Mali Empire: Sundiata, the crippled prince, rises to defeat the sorcerer-king and establish the greatest empire in West African history.
introduction: The foundation epic of the Mali Empire: Sundiata, the crippled prince, rises to defeat the sorcerer-king and establish the greatest empire in West African history.

translation.original_text: Je suis griot. Depuis des temps immémoriaux les Keita sont les maîtres du Mandingue.
translation.text: I am a griot. Since time immemorial the Keita have been the masters of the Manding.
